summary: ManDev is a Next.js 15 App Router dashboard for tracking projects, features, backlog items, and per-project architecture diagrams. React Server Components and client UI in src/components render pages under src/app/(app). Mutations flow through Server Actions that validate with Zod schemas in src/lib/validations, then call domain services in src/services that use a shared Prisma client from src/lib/db against SQLite (Project, Feature, ProjectArchitecture). Optional password protection uses middleware.ts with JWT session cookies via jose (src/lib/mandev-session), login Server Actions, and a logout route handler. Architecture diagrams render with Mermaid on the client. Projects with a localPath can import .mandev/architecture.json from disk through readArchitectureImportFromLocalPath. There are no external HTTP APIs in this codebase.
mermaidSource:
flowchart TD
  Browser["Browser"]
  Middleware["Next.js Middleware"]
  Auth["JWT Session Auth"]
  App["App Router RSC Pages"]
  UI["React UI Components"]
  Actions["Server Actions"]
  Zod["Zod Validation"]
  Services["Domain Services"]
  Prisma["Prisma Client"]
  SQLite["SQLite Database"]
  LocalFile[".mandev/architecture.json"]
  Mermaid["Mermaid Diagram"]

  Browser --> Middleware
  Middleware --> Auth
  Auth --> App
  App --> UI
  UI --> Actions
  Actions --> Zod
  Zod --> Services
  Services --> Prisma
  Prisma --> SQLite
  Services --> LocalFile
  UI --> Mermaid
